description:
Configure Avare with a True Airspeed (TAS) of 135 knots and a Fuel Burn of 14.5 GPH. Create a flight plan named 'DivertKFAT' from KMOD (Modesto City-County) to KFAT (Fresno Yosemite Intl). Calculate the estimated time enroute (ETE) in minutes and fuel usage in gallons for this diversion. Record the results in /sdcard/diversion_calc.txt using the format:
ETE_MIN: [minutes]
FUEL_GAL: [gallons]
(Round to the nearest whole number or one decimal place).
